title: TagDetectionRecord
description: A single tag detection from the tag-audit-and-takeoff skill. Covers element instances, type definitions, and derived instances.

record_type.description: Determines how this record contributes to QTO

sheet_id.description: Sheet identifier where detected or where target room exists

tag_type.description: CSI-aligned tag category (e.g., plumbing_fixtures, light_fixtures, doors)

tag_text.description: Reconstructed tag text from grouped OCR items

constituent_item_ids.description: OCR extracted item IDs that form this tag (not present for derived instances)

composite_bbox.description: Union bounding box of all constituent items

associated_items.description: Related items: room number, dimensions, finish codes, etc.

view_type.description: Drawing view type where this tag was found

parent_view_label.description: View title for type definitions (e.g., 'TYPICAL TOILET')

type_def_id.description: Source type definition ID for derived instances

derivation_method.description: How the derived instance link was established

deduplicated.description: True if a direct instance already exists at this location
